testcase.name: create: new location appears in card list

failure.message: locations.spec.ts:7:1 create: new location appears in card list

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › locations.spec.ts:7:1 › create: new location appears in card list ───────────────────
Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('button, a').filter({ hasText: /new\s*(adventure|location)|\+/i }).first()
at page-objects\LocationPage.ts:28
26 | .filter({ hasText: /new\s*(adventure|location)|\+/i }) 27 | .first() > 28 | .click(); | ^ 29 | await expect(this.modal).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8_000 }); 30 | } 31 | at LocationPage.openCreateModal (C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\tests\e2e\page-objects\LocationPage.ts:28:8) at LocationPage.create (C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\tests\e2e\page-objects\LocationPage.ts:46:16) at C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\tests\e2e\locations.spec.ts:11:12

testcase.name: create: name-only (minimal) location succeeds

testcase.name: create: submitting empty name keeps modal open
create: XSS payload in name field is not executed
edit: updated name reflects in card list
delete: confirming removes card from list
delete: cancelling keeps card in list
search: typing a name filters to matching cards
search: gibberish query shows empty state
API: POST /api/locations/ creates record with correct name
detail: /locations/:id shows location name in heading
